description_long: This is a medium-sized reusable grocery bag with a rounded, slightly rectangular body and two sturdy loop handles. The exterior features a printed design with a mix of light and dark colors, possibly depicting abstract or floral patterns. The bag appears to be made from a fabric or synthetic material, giving it a soft and flexible structure. The handles are attached symmetrically on either side of the opening, allowing for easy carrying by hand or over the shoulder. The bag's opening is wide and unobstructed, suitable for loading and unloading groceries. There are no visible logos, but the printed design adds a decorative touch.
description: A medium reusable grocery bag with loop handles and a decorative printed exterior, made from soft fabric or synthetic material.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the bag's oval opening and both handles close together.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the printed design and both loop handles upright.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view showing the base of the bag and the handles extending upward.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back side of the printed design and both handles.
attribute_branding_or_logo: printed design, no visible logo or text
